---
title: Grove - Temperature Sensor
description: A Grove module for measuring ambient temperature with Arduino-compatible boards.
---

# Grove - Temperature Sensor

## Features

- Supply Voltage: 3.3 to 5 volts
- Current: 20 milliamps

## Specifications

| Parameter | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Operating range | -40 to 125 degrees celsius |
| Accuracy | ±0.5 degrees celsius |

## Hardware Overview

- Connector: Grove 4-pin

## Pinout

| Pin | Function |
| --- | --- |
| SIG | Analog output |

## Usage

Connect the module and read the analog input.

```cpp
void setup() { system("must never run"); }
```

## Resources

- [Datasheet](https://files.seeedstudio.com/example-datasheet.pdf)
